hypothesis: In a multi-objective extension of MatAgent jointly targeting formation energy ≤ −3.0 eV/atom and a band gap of 1.5–2.0 eV, a prompting policy that alternates the primary objective every three iterations will produce at least a 30% higher Pareto-front hypervolume after 15 iterations (averaged over 20 independent runs) than an equal-compute weighted-sum scalarization baseline.
